name: dns-refresh-probe
description: One-shot network diagnostic that snapshots route/DNS state, rewrites /etc/resolv.conf to a better DNS candidate, and reruns connectivity checks.
author: dspl1236
scripts: dns_refresh_probe.sh - Back up resolv.conf to SD, pick a DNS target from SD override or default gateway, rewrite resolv.conf, and log before/after connectivity checks
notes: Tested on a US RNS-850 (HN+_US_VW_P0738) to recover from stale DNS after LTE setup.
Writes only /etc/resolv.conf and logs results to SD card; does not persist changes in flash.
If present, /dns-refresh-target.txt on the SD card overrides the auto-detected DNS target.
